Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Option

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Option
public class Option extends Object
Option

Option specific asset details

    static Option.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<CallPut>
    callPut()
    Indicates whether the option is a Call or a Put.
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    Optional<ExerciseStyle>
    exerciseStyle()
    Indicates how and when an option can be exercised, either American (exercise any time before expiration) or European (exercise only at expiration).
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AssetExpirationDate>
    expirationDate()
    The date when the option contract expires.
    int
    hashCode()
     
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OptionRoot>
    optionRoot()
    The full option root information
    Optional<OptionType>
    optionType()
    Type of deliverable asset the option is set to deliver upon expiry.
    Optional<String>
    rootSymbol()
    The leading segment of the OSI, which is typically the original deliverable symbol of the option.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SeriesDate>
    seriesDate()
    The date of the option contract this is the value in the OSI and is typically the same as the expiration_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated.
    Optional<SettlementMethod>
    settlementMethod()
    Specifies how an option is settled at expiration, either Physical (delivery of the underlying asset) or Cash (payment of the cash difference).
    Optional<SettlementType>
    settlementType()
    Indicates whether an option follows Standard settlement terms or has Non-Standard terms, often due to adjustments like corporate actions.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<StrikePrice>
    strikePrice()
    The price at which the option holder can buy or sell the deliverable asset(s)
    String
    toString()

  • Constructor Details

    • Option

      public Option(Optional<? extends CallPut> callPut, Optional<? extends ExerciseStyle> exerciseStyle, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetExpirationDate> expirationDate, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends OptionRoot> optionRoot, Optional<? extends OptionType> optionType, Optional<String> rootSymbol, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SeriesDate> seriesDate, Optional<? extends SettlementMethod> settlementMethod, Optional<? extends SettlementType> settlementType, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends StrikePrice> strikePrice)

    • Option

      public Option()

  • Method Details

    • callPut

      public Optional<CallPut> callPut()
      Indicates whether the option is a Call or a Put. A Put entitles the holder to sell shares at the specified strike_price, while a Call entitles the holder to buy shares at the specified strike_price.

    • exerciseStyle

      public Optional<ExerciseStyle> exerciseStyle()
      Indicates how and when an option can be exercised, either American (exercise any time before expiration) or European (exercise only at expiration).

    • expirationDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AssetExpirationDate> expirationDate()
      The date when the option contract expires. This will typically match the series_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated for a given series. This field will represent the actual expiration date.

    • optionRoot

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OptionRoot> optionRoot()
      The full option root information

    • optionType

      public Optional<OptionType> optionType()
      Type of deliverable asset the option is set to deliver upon expiry.

    • rootSymbol

      public Optional<String> rootSymbol()
      The leading segment of the OSI, which is typically the original deliverable symbol of the option. There are frequent exceptions to this rule, such as when there are multiple deliverables or the deliverable goes through a corporate action.

    • seriesDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SeriesDate> seriesDate()
      The date of the option contract this is the value in the OSI and is typically the same as the expiration_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated.

    • settlementMethod

      public Optional<SettlementMethod> settlementMethod()
      Specifies how an option is settled at expiration, either Physical (delivery of the underlying asset) or Cash (payment of the cash difference).

    • settlementType

      public Optional<SettlementType> settlementType()
      Indicates whether an option follows Standard settlement terms or has Non-Standard terms, often due to adjustments like corporate actions.

    • strikePrice

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<StrikePrice> strikePrice()
      The price at which the option holder can buy or sell the deliverable asset(s)

    • builder

      public static Option.Builder builder()

    • withCallPut

      public Option withCallPut(CallPut callPut)
      Indicates whether the option is a Call or a Put. A Put entitles the holder to sell shares at the specified strike_price, while a Call entitles the holder to buy shares at the specified strike_price.

    • withCallPut

      public Option withCallPut(Optional<? extends CallPut> callPut)
      Indicates whether the option is a Call or a Put. A Put entitles the holder to sell shares at the specified strike_price, while a Call entitles the holder to buy shares at the specified strike_price.

    • withExerciseStyle

      public Option withExerciseStyle(ExerciseStyle exerciseStyle)
      Indicates how and when an option can be exercised, either American (exercise any time before expiration) or European (exercise only at expiration).

    • withExerciseStyle

      public Option withExerciseStyle(Optional<? extends ExerciseStyle> exerciseStyle)
      Indicates how and when an option can be exercised, either American (exercise any time before expiration) or European (exercise only at expiration).

    • withExpirationDate

      public Option withExpirationDate(AssetExpirationDate expirationDate)
      The date when the option contract expires. This will typically match the series_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated for a given series. This field will represent the actual expiration date.

    • withExpirationDate

      public Option withExpirationDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends AssetExpirationDate> expirationDate)
      The date when the option contract expires. This will typically match the series_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated for a given series. This field will represent the actual expiration date.

      The full option root information

      The full option root information

      Type of deliverable asset the option is set to deliver upon expiry.

      Type of deliverable asset the option is set to deliver upon expiry.

    • withRootSymbol

      public Option withRootSymbol(String rootSymbol)
      The leading segment of the OSI, which is typically the original deliverable symbol of the option. There are frequent exceptions to this rule, such as when there are multiple deliverables or the deliverable goes through a corporate action.

    • withRootSymbol

      public Option withRootSymbol(Optional<String> rootSymbol)
      The leading segment of the OSI, which is typically the original deliverable symbol of the option. There are frequent exceptions to this rule, such as when there are multiple deliverables or the deliverable goes through a corporate action.

    • withSeriesDate

      public Option withSeriesDate(SeriesDate seriesDate)
      The date of the option contract this is the value in the OSI and is typically the same as the expiration_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated.

    • withSeriesDate

      public Option withSeriesDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends SeriesDate> seriesDate)
      The date of the option contract this is the value in the OSI and is typically the same as the expiration_date but can vary when the option expiration is accelerated.

    • withSettlementMethod

      public Option withSettlementMethod(SettlementMethod settlementMethod)
      Specifies how an option is settled at expiration, either Physical (delivery of the underlying asset) or Cash (payment of the cash difference).

    • withSettlementMethod

      public Option withSettlementMethod(Optional<? extends SettlementMethod> settlementMethod)
      Specifies how an option is settled at expiration, either Physical (delivery of the underlying asset) or Cash (payment of the cash difference).

    • withSettlementType

      public Option withSettlementType(SettlementType settlementType)
      Indicates whether an option follows Standard settlement terms or has Non-Standard terms, often due to adjustments like corporate actions.

    • withSettlementType

      public Option withSettlementType(Optional<? extends SettlementType> settlementType)
      Indicates whether an option follows Standard settlement terms or has Non-Standard terms, often due to adjustments like corporate actions.
